benefits.name: Parental leave
benefits.short_description: Up to 18 weeks of fully paid parental leave for primary caregivers.
benefits.long_description: We offer a competitive parental leave policy designed to support all kinds of families. Eligible primary caregivers receive up to 18 weeks of fully paid parental leave, while secondary caregivers receive up to 8 weeks of paid leave. Leave can typically be taken flexibly within the first year after birth, adoption, or foster placement, subject to local regulations. In some countries, our policy works in combination with statutory government programs to maintain full or near-full pay during your leave.
benefits.location_scope: Global baseline policy with local adaptations; exact duration and pay structure may vary based on country-specific regulations.

benefits.name: Health insurance
benefits.short_description: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage in most locations.
benefits.long_description: We provide market-competitive health insurance plans that typically include medical, dental, and vision coverage for employees and their eligible dependents. Coverage details, providers, and cost-sharing arrangements (such as premiums and co-pays) vary by country and, in some cases, by region. Where private insurance is not customary, we supplement public healthcare with additional wellness benefits.
benefits.location_scope: Offered in all employing countries with plan design tailored to local market standards and regulations.

benefits.name: Remote work & home office stipend
benefits.short_description: Annual stipend for remote setup and monthly support for internet and utilities.
benefits.long_description: To help you do your best work from anywhere, we offer an annual home office stipend that can be used toward ergonomic furniture, monitors, and other productivity equipment. Many locations also provide a recurring monthly allowance to offset internet, phone, or utility costs associated with remote work. Stipend amounts and eligible expenses may vary depending on your country of employment.
benefits.location_scope: Available to remote-eligible roles in most countries; specific stipend amounts are set locally.

benefits.name: Learning & development budget
benefits.short_description: Annual budget for courses, conferences, and certifications.
benefits.long_description: We invest in continuous learning through an annual development budget that employees can use for conferences, online courses, books, professional memberships, and certifications. In addition, we run internal training programs, mentorship opportunities, and leadership development tracks. Budget amounts are benchmarked by country to reflect local pricing and currency differences.
benefits.location_scope: Global program with budget levels and eligible vendors tailored by region.

benefits.name: Retirement & pension plans
benefits.short_description: Company-sponsored retirement savings or pension programs.
benefits.long_description: Depending on your country of employment, we offer employer-matched retirement savings plans (such as 401(k) in the US) or participate in statutory pension schemes with additional company contributions. Eligibility, vesting schedules, and contribution limits differ by country but are designed to help you build long-term financial security.
benefits.location_scope: Offered in all employing countries, aligned with local legal and tax frameworks.

departments.name: Engineering
departments.description: Builds and maintains our products and platforms, including software engineering, infrastructure, and QA.

departments.name: Marketing
departments.description: Drives brand awareness, product marketing, and demand generation across all regions.

departments.name: Data & Analytics
departments.description: Delivers insights, reporting, and advanced analytics to support data-informed decisions.

departments.name: Design & UX
departments.description: Creates user-centered experiences across research, product design, and design systems.

departments.name: Recruiting & People
departments.description: Leads talent acquisition and partners with people operations on hiring and candidate experience.

jobs.title: Software Engineer - Backend (New York)
jobs.description: Join our core platform team to design and build scalable backend services that power our customer-facing products.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years of professional software engineering experience; strong proficiency in Java or Kotlin; experience with relational databases and RESTful APIs; familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS or GCP; BS in Computer Science or equivalent practical experience.
jobs.responsibilities: Design, build, and maintain backend services and APIs; collaborate with product managers and frontend engineers to deliver end-to-end features; write clean, testable, and maintainable code; participate in code reviews and technical design discussions; help improve performance, reliability, and observability of our services.

jobs.title: Software Engineer - Frontend (New York)
jobs.description: Work on our web applications to deliver fast, accessible, and delightful user experiences.
jobs.requirements: 2+ years of experience building modern web applications with React or similar frameworks; solid understanding of JavaScript or TypeScript, HTML, and CSS; experience consuming REST or GraphQL APIs; familiarity with testing frameworks such as Jest or Cypress.
jobs.responsibilities: Implement responsive UI components; collaborate closely with designers and backend engineers; maintain high-quality code with tests and documentation; contribute to frontend architecture and performance improvements.

jobs.title: Software Engineer - Backend (Berlin)
jobs.description: Help build resilient backend services for our European product engineering hub in Berlin.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years of backend development experience; strong skills in Java, Kotlin, or Go; experience with microservices, messaging systems, and SQL/NoSQL databases; working proficiency in English.
jobs.responsibilities: Design and implement backend services; ensure reliability and scalability of the platform; collaborate with cross-functional teams across Europe and the US; maintain high engineering standards through reviews and documentation.

jobs.title: Software Engineer - Distributed Systems (Remote - Europe)
jobs.description: Join our fully distributed engineering team in Europe to build large-scale distributed systems.
jobs.requirements: 4+ years of backend or distributed systems experience; proficiency in Go, Java, or Rust; experience with event-driven architectures and cloud-native environments; comfortable working remotely across time zones.
jobs.responsibilities: Design and implement highly available services; collaborate asynchronously with engineers and product managers across Europe; improve reliability, observability, and automation of our systems; participate in incident response and postmortems.

jobs.title: Product Manager - Core Platform (Remote)
jobs.description: Own the roadmap for our core platform capabilities, working with teams across the company to deliver scalable solutions.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years of product management experience in a SaaS or platform environment; strong technical literacy working with APIs and backend systems; experience gathering and prioritizing requirements; excellent communication skills.
jobs.responsibilities: Define and communicate product strategy and roadmap for core platform features; collaborate with engineering, design, and stakeholders to deliver high-impact improvements; write clear product specs; analyze data and customer feedback to inform decisions.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager - Growth (Remote)
jobs.description: Lead our growth product initiatives, driving acquisition, activation, and retention across our product suite.
jobs.requirements: 5+ years of product management experience with a focus on growth or experimentation; strong analytical skills and familiarity with A/B testing; experience working closely with marketing and data teams; excellent stakeholder management.
jobs.responsibilities: Own the growth strategy and roadmap; design experiments to improve key funnel metrics; collaborate with engineering, design, data, and marketing; define and track success metrics; mentor more junior PMs.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer (Remote)
jobs.description: Join our global platform team as a senior backend engineer building high-scale services for millions of users.
jobs.requirements: 6+ years of backend engineering experience; expertise in at least one of Java, Go, or Python; strong understanding of distributed systems and cloud infrastructure; experience mentoring other engineers.
jobs.responsibilities: Design and implement complex backend services; lead technical design reviews; improve performance, reliability, and security of our systems; collaborate with engineers across time zones; contribute to technical strategy and best practices.

jobs.title: Senior UX Designer (Berlin)
jobs.description: Lead design for key product areas and help shape our design system from our Berlin office.
jobs.requirements: 5+ years of experience in UX or product design; strong portfolio showcasing end-to-end product design work; proficiency with modern design tools; experience collaborating with product and engineering teams.
jobs.responsibilities: Own UX for core product surfaces; conduct user research and usability testing; create flows, wireframes, and high-fidelity designs; contribute to and evolve our design system; mentor junior designers.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description: Partner with product and business teams to deliver insights and reporting that inform key decisions.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years of experience in data analysis or business intelligence; strong SQL skills; experience with BI tools such as Looker, Tableau, or Power BI; familiarity with Python or R is a plus.
jobs.responsibilities: Work with stakeholders to define metrics and reporting needs; build and maintain dashboards; perform deep-dive analyses; communicate findings and recommendations; contribute to data quality and governance efforts.

jobs.title: Marketing Manager - B2B Campaigns
jobs.description: Drive integrated B2B marketing campaigns to support pipeline and revenue goals in EMEA.
jobs.requirements: 4+ years of B2B marketing experience; track record running integrated campaigns; experience with marketing automation and CRM tools; strong analytical and communication skills.
jobs.responsibilities: Plan and execute multi-channel campaigns; partner with sales on account-based strategies; manage campaign budgets and performance; report on pipeline and ROI; collaborate with product marketing on messaging and positioning.

jobs.title: Senior Marketing Manager - Brand & Communications
jobs.description: Lead brand and communications programs in the UK and Europe, elevating our presence across key audiences.
jobs.requirements: 7+ years in marketing or communications; experience leading brand campaigns; excellent storytelling and writing skills; proven ability to work with executive stakeholders and agencies.
jobs.responsibilities: Develop and execute brand strategy for the region; oversee PR and communications initiatives; manage agency relationships; ensure consistent messaging across channels; mentor members of the marketing team.

jobs.title: Software Engineer Intern (Berlin)
jobs.description: Work with our Berlin engineering team on real product features as a software engineering intern.
jobs.requirements: Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science or related field; familiarity with at least one programming language such as Java, Python, or JavaScript; basic understanding of data structures and algorithms; eligibility to work in Germany during the internship period.
jobs.responsibilities: Contribute to feature development under the guidance of a mentor; write and test code; participate in code reviews; help troubleshoot bugs and improve existing features; learn our development tools and processes.

jobs.title: Software Engineer Intern (Paris)
jobs.description: Join our Paris team for a hands-on software engineering internship working on our web applications.
jobs.requirements: Enrolled in or recently graduated from a technical degree program; basic experience with web development or backend technologies; able to communicate in English; French is a plus.
jobs.responsibilities: Implement small features and bug fixes; collaborate with engineers and designers; write unit tests; attend team ceremonies and demos; document your work and learnings.

jobs.title: Software Engineer Intern (Amsterdam)
jobs.description: Support our Amsterdam engineering team in building and testing new product features as an intern.
jobs.requirements: Studying computer science or a related field, or equivalent experience; familiarity with at least one modern programming language; interest in web technologies and cloud services; strong willingness to learn.
jobs.responsibilities: Collaborate with engineers on implementation tasks; help improve test coverage; participate in code reviews; assist with debugging and documentation; present your work at the end of the internship.

jobs.title: Software Engineer Intern (Munich)
jobs.description: An earlier cohort software engineering internship position in our Munich office.
jobs.requirements: Student or recent graduate in a technical degree; basic programming skills.
jobs.responsibilities: Assist engineering team with development tasks and bug fixes; learn our tooling and processes.

jobs.title: Marketing Intern (London)
jobs.description: Support our UK marketing team with campaign execution, content, and events.
jobs.requirements: Currently enrolled in a marketing, communications, or business program; strong written and verbal communication skills; interest in B2B or tech marketing.
jobs.responsibilities: Assist with campaign coordination; help create marketing collateral; support social media and events; conduct basic market research; track and report on campaign metrics.

jobs.title: UX Researcher (Berlin)
jobs.description: Conduct user research that informs product strategy and design decisions for our Berlin-based product teams.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years of UX research experience; strong skills in qualitative and quantitative methods such as user interviews, usability testing, and surveys; experience working in cross-functional product teams; portfolio or examples of past research work.
jobs.responsibilities: Plan and conduct research studies; synthesize findings into clear insights and recommendations; collaborate closely with designers, PMs, and engineers; evangelize user-centric practices; help build and maintain our research repository.

jobs.title: Data Analyst (Remote - Europe)
jobs.description: Work remotely within Europe to deliver analysis, dashboards, and experimentation insights for our product teams.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years of experience in analytics; excellent SQL; experience with a modern BI tool; comfortable working remotely and asynchronously; experience with experimentation frameworks is a plus.
jobs.responsibilities: Partner with product and growth teams to define metrics and build dashboards; perform deep-dive analyses; support A/B test design and evaluation; communicate data-driven recommendations to stakeholders.

jobs.title: Customer Support Engineer (Madrid)
jobs.description: Provide technical support to our enterprise customers, troubleshooting complex issues and collaborating with engineering to resolve them.
jobs.requirements: 2+ years in a technical support or customer-facing engineering role; strong troubleshooting and communication skills; familiarity with APIs, web technologies, and databases; proficiency in English and Spanish.
jobs.responsibilities: Investigate and resolve customer issues; reproduce bugs and work with engineering on fixes; document solutions and best practices; contribute to support tooling and knowledge base; participate in an on-call rotation.
